## Safety

- [ ] Global dry-run remains enabled.
- [ ] Real email sending remains disabled unless this is an explicitly approved go-live PR.
- [ ] Policy, suppression, idempotency, and audit invariants are preserved.
- [ ] `https://innovateats.com` remains mandatory in outreach email.

## Verification

- [ ] Format
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Build
- [ ] Migration checks where applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated
